chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Crl. Bail Application No.2493 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________________ For hearing of Bail Application. ----------- Dated; 17th November 2025 Ms. Saima Ameeer Ali, Advocate for Applicant. Mr. Ali Haider Salim, Addl. Prosecutor General, Sindh. -*-*-*-*-*- After arguing the matter at some length learned counsel for applicant seeks disposal of this bail application and direction to the trial Court to expedite the trial. This proposal has been accepted by learned Addl. P.G. Sindh. Accordingly, this bail application is dismissed as not pressed. However, the trial Court shall expedite the trial and conclude the same preferably within a period of six months. JUDGE JUDGE *Farhan/PS*
